package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for context_not_first_parameter: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Functions that accept context.Context but not as the first non-receiver parameter on context-aware call paths.
type CaseContextNotFirstParameterDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseContextNotFirstParameterModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseContextNotFirstParameterRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseContextNotFirstParameterModel
}

type CaseContextNotFirstParameterService struct {
    repo *CaseContextNotFirstParameterRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseContextNotFirstParameterAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeContextNotFirstParameter(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseContextNotFirstParameterDTO) error {
    focus := "context_not_first_parameter"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    useContextFirst := func(inner context.Context, id string) { _ = inner; _ = id }
    useContextFirst(child, input)
    context_not_first_parameter_negative := map[string]int{"context": 1, "not": 2, "first": 3, "parameter": 4}
    context_not_first_parameter_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    context_negative_0 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_0
    not_negative_1 := context_not_first_parameter_negative["not"] + len(input)
    _ = not_negative_1
    first_negative_2 := context_not_first_parameter_negative["first"] + len(input)
    _ = first_negative_2
    parameter_negative_3 := context_not_first_parameter_negative["parameter"] + len(input)
    _ = parameter_negative_3
    return nil
}
